title: Thuruppugulan
desc: Menon buys land for his five-star hotel and asks his trusted employee, Sreedharan Unnithan, to take its charge. Years later, Unnithan gets Menon imprisoned in a fake case and Kunjumon helps him.

title: The Door
desc: Mithra, an architect, demolishes an old site to construct a new building. However, her actions end up releasing a paranormal entity into her life.

title: Alangu
desc: While trying to cross over to Kerala, a Tamil tribal boy and his group of friends get drawn into communal clashes that erupt along the state border.

title: Dada
desc: Manikandan, a young boy, endures many hardships and faces the challenges of raising a son as a single parent after accidentally impregnating his lover.
